_**Agent (default)**_

Added a `docs/phases/` folder and documented Phase 0 in detail. Here’s what changed:

### New files

- **`docs/phases/README.md`** — Index of all phases with status and links
- **`docs/phases/phase-0-foundation.md`** — Full Phase 0 delivery notes covering:
  - Deliverables checklist
  - Solution layout and dependency graph
  - What was built per layer (AppHost, ServiceDefaults, Domain, Infrastructure, Web, tests, CI)
  - Architecture decisions (ADRs)
  - Demo walkthrough
  - Verification commands (2 passing tests)
  - What’s deferred to Phase 1

### Updated references

- **`docs/ROADMAP.md`** — Phase 0 is marked complete with a link to the detailed doc; the long inline checklist is replaced by a summary
- **`README.md`** — Documentation table and solution layout now link to `docs/phases/`

The Phase 0 doc reflects what’s actually in the repo: Aspire + PostgreSQL, MudBlazor shell, `ListRegistrationCases` slice, `RegistrationCase` stub, fake officer auth, initial migration, and CI. When Phase 1 is done, add `docs/phases/phase-1-case-intake.md` and update the index.
